lines.gurmukhi: ਮਿਟਹਿ ਕੋਟਿ ਅਘ ਨਿਮਖ ਜਸੁ ਗਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: mitteh kott agh nimakh jas gaau |
lines.english: millions of sins are washed away in an instant, singing His Praises.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲਾਲ ਨਾਮ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਭਰੇ ਭੰਡਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: laal naam jaa kai bhare bhanddaar |
lines.english: His treasure is overflowing with the rubies of the Name.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਤਿ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਜਾ ਕੋ ਹੈ ਨਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: sat purakh jaa ko hai naau |
lines.english: The Name is the True Primal Being;
He gives Support to all hearts. ||3||
The Lord God is your best friend, your playmate from earliest childhood.
He is the Support of the breath of life; O Nanak, He is love, He is consciousness. ||4||1||3||
My consciousness takes to the Shelter of the Naam.
I trade in the Naam, the Name of the Lord.
Gond, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਮੋੁ ਹੀ ਇਸੁ ਮਨ ਕਾ ਅਧਾਰੁ ॥
lines.translit: naamo hee is man kaa adhaar |
lines.english: The Naam is the Support of the mind.
The Lord has blessed me with the wealth of the Naam, the Name of the One Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਨ ਕਾ ਇਸਟੁ ਗੁਰ ਸੰਗਿ ਧਿਆਨੁ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: man kaa isatt gur sang dhiaan |1| rahaau |
lines.english: The wish of my mind is to meditate on the Naam, in association with the Guru. ||1||Pause||
Chanting the Naam, millions of sins are erased. ||1||
The Naam is sweet to my mind.
The Naam is the wealth of my soul.
Wherever I go, the Naam is with me.
Through the Naam, all one's generations are saved.
Through the Naam, one's face becomes radiant in the Court of the Lord.
Through the Naam, my affairs are resolved.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਲਿ ਥਲਿ ਸਭ ਮਹਿ ਨਾਮੋ ਡੀਠਾ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jal thal sabh meh naamo ddeetthaa |2|
lines.english: In the water, on the land, and everywhere, I see the Naam. ||2||
Through the Naam, I have become fearless.
Through the Naam, my comings and goings have ceased.
My mind is accustomed to the Naam. ||3||
The Perfect Guru has united me with the Lord, the treasure of virtue.
Gond, Fifth Mehl:
Says Nanak, I dwell in celestial peace. ||4||2||4||
he protects those in the terrible womb.
So humbly bow forever to that Lord and Master. ||1||
and gives gifts to all the hungry;
He grants honor to the dishonored,
Meditate on such a God in your mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟਿ ਅਵਘਟਿ ਜਤ ਕਤਹਿ ਸਹਾਇ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: ghatt avaghatt jat kateh sahaae |1| rahaau |
lines.english: He shall be your help and support everywhere, in good times and bad. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੰਕੁ ਰਾਉ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਏਕ ਸਮਾਨਿ ॥
lines.translit: rank raau jaa kai ek samaan |
lines.english: The beggar and the king are all the same to Him.
He sustains and fulfills both the ant and the elephant.
He does not consult or seek anyone's advice.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਕਿਛੁ ਕਰੈ ਸੁ ਆਪਹਿ ਕਰੈ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jo kichh karai su aapeh karai |2|
lines.english: Whatever He does, He does Himself. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕਾ ਅੰਤੁ ਨ ਜਾਨਸਿ ਕੋਇ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kaa ant na jaanas koe |
lines.english: No one knows His limit.
He Himself is the Immaculate Lord.
He Himself is formed, and He Himself is formless.
Singing the Praises of the Creator, the Saints are forever in bliss.

lines.gurmukhi: ਘਟ ਘਟ ਘਟਿ ਸਭ ਘਟ ਆਧਾਰੁ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: ghatt ghatt ghatt sabh ghatt aadhaar |3|
lines.english: In the heart, in each and every heart, He is the Support of all hearts. ||3||
Through the Love of the Naam, the Name of the Lord, the devotees become His Beloveds.
Through the Love of the Naam, the Lord's humble servants remain satisfied.
Gond, Fifth Mehl:
Nanak falls at the feet of those humble servants of the Lord. ||4||3||5||
Associating with them, the heart is illumined. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਇਹੁ ਮਨੁ ਨਿਰਮਲੁ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai sang ihu man niramal |
lines.english: Associating with them, this mind becomes immaculate and pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਹੋਹਿ ਨਾਸ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai sang kilabikh hohi naas |
lines.english: Associating with them, all the sins are erased.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਸਿਮਰਨੁ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai sang har har simaran |
lines.english: Associating with them, one meditates in remembrance on the Lord, Har, Har.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੇਵਲ ਨਾਮੁ ਗਾਈਐ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਨੀਤ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: keval naam gaaeeai jaa kai neet |1| rahaau |
lines.english: It is their custom to sing only the Naam, the Name of the Lord. ||1||Pause||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇ ਸੰਤਨ ਹਰਿ ਕੇ ਮੇਰੇ ਮੀਤ ॥
lines.translit: se santan har ke mere meet |
lines.english: Those Saints of the Lord are my friends.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਮੰਤ੍ਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਮਨਿ ਵਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai mantr har har man vasai |
lines.english: By their mantra, the Lord, Har, Har, dwells in the mind.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਉਪਦੇਸਿ ਭਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਨਸੈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai upades bharam bhau nasai |
lines.english: By their teachings, doubt and fear are dispelled.
By their kirtan, they become immaculate and sublime.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕੋਟਿ ਪਤਿਤ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਸੰਗਿ ਉਧਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: kott patit jaa kai sang udhaar |
lines.english: Millions of sinners are saved by associating with them.
The world longs for the dust of their feet. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਏਕੁ ਨਿਰੰਕਾਰੁ ਜਾ ਕੈ ਨਾਮ ਅਧਾਰ ॥
lines.translit: ek nirankaar jaa kai naam adhaar |
lines.english: They have the Support of the Name of the One Formless Lord.
He is the treasure of mercy, the divine immaculate Lord. ||3||
then one meets the Merciful Holy Guru.
He knows the secrets of all beings;
When the Supreme Lord God becomes merciful,
